memory.summary: My friends are heading to Echo and want me to join, but my midterm is tomorrow morning and I still need about two more hours of review to feel fully prepared.
I've officially declined Mina's invitation to Echo, prioritizing the two hours of study needed for tomorrow's midterm over social plans.
I successfully studied for 2 hours, raising my preparation level to 0.78, and I have now missed the window to go out with friends.
My second hour of studying brought my preparation level to 0.92, significantly closer to being ready for tomorrow's midterm.
I slept well for seven hours, waking up with full energy and no sleep debt. This rest has left me ready to face tomorrow's midterm.
I have fully completed my study preparation for the midterm, which is now beginning.
I have accepted Mina's invitation, confirming our meeting for today.
